title: Few-shot Learning
summary: The ability of a model to learn from a small number of examples. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Low-Data Learning. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Deep Few-Shot Learning and Few-Shot Meta-Learning.
